headline: MARKET WRAP — May 20
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 20, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Risk appetite returned with tech and biotech leading a selective growth rotation while traditional energy lagged. Semiconductor strength anchored the tech bid as institutional flows favored innovation sectors over cyclicals. Tomorrow's setup hinges on whether growth momentum can broaden beyond select pockets despite crypto headwinds.
